productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men Printed Green T-shirt
description: Composition Green round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline and tape in-seam, short sleeves and has graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Flat dry in shade Enjoy those mind-calming sessions of yoga in style and comfort in this urban yoga T-shirt. Made of pure, sweat absorbent cotton, this tee is stitched with flat seams and a printed label to prevent irritation, allowing you to concentrate on your yoga activity. Reinforced tear points give strength, while the grippy fabric ensures it doesn't slip and cause discomfort when you exercise. The stretchable, soft fabric and split hem is all that you need to feel at ease during those exercise sessions. Team this with track pants for ultimate comfort. Model statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
